title: Holoduplicator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Holoduplicator''' was a device developed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] that was used to duplicate any [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] image or video in three dimensions.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
